summary: Add Plato Symposium (Jowett 1871) entry to manifest + verify acquire.py
description:
Append [[source]] entry to sources/manifest.toml:

id = "plato-symposium"
tradition = "platonism"
label = "Plato: Symposium"
url = "https://sacred-texts.com/cla/plato/symposiu.htm"
format = "html"
license = "public_domain"
translator = "Benjamin Jowett"
notes = "Jowett's 1871 Scribner edition. Diotima speech (201d-212c) — direct source for Plotinus On the Beautiful (Ennead I.6) and Bruno's Eroici Furori. Single-file HTML."

NOTE: 'platonism' is a new tradition string. Verify the tag/edge pipeline handles a new tradition value without manual intervention. Run acquire.py and confirm raw/platonism/plato-symposium.txt + .meta.toml are produced.
